_comment: CLAMR cell-based AMR shallow water — 4 MPI ranks throughout.
Shared by vanilla, LLM-baseline, and reference runs.
Checkpoint enable: -c 500 (Crux cadence). Vanilla post-strip REJECTS -c
('Unknown input parameter c' from input.cpp arg parser). Mirror the
ROSS pattern: keep -c only in resilient_app_args. The vanilla arm
small-low rationale: kill at 5s after first reference checkpoint at
cycle 500. Restart loads latest .crx and redoes remaining cycles.

scenarios.name: small-once
scenarios._purpose: 1 failure injected at 5s. Reference recovers from latest .crx; LLM-baseline recovers via VeloC.
